title: What video game
wikitext:
[]: What video game...             Quote Post by Dave » Mon Aug 02, 2004 6:24 pm ... was Asuka playing at Hikari's house? The music to it sounded familiar... well whatever it is, I want it.

[]:             Quote Post by EvaPimp » Mon Aug 02, 2004 9:00 pm Actually, the song in the game is not from a game at all. Its one of the background tracks on the Eva OST.

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Mon Aug 02, 2004 9:38 pm Um... just because it is on the Eva OST doesn't mean it isn't from a game. I suppose it's possible, but are you sure?

[]:             Quote Post by houtaru » Mon Aug 02, 2004 10:47 pm EvaPimp wrote: Actually, the song in the game is not from a game at all. Its one of the background tracks on the Eva OST.

[]:             Quote Post by Kiel » Tue Aug 03, 2004 6:21 am Wow. I always wondered what game that was. I assumed it was something 32-bit and side-scroll-ley... but Eva OST background music? :shock: Is it possible she was playing some kind of Super Famicon NGE game?! No wonder she played it for so long...

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Tue Aug 03, 2004 2:27 pm The music is simply called "BACKGROUND MUSIC II" from OST 3. It is a sort of cowboy-themed rendition of the NERV theme. The game she is playing is Puyo Puyo (a puzzle game of matching colors, like Puyo Pop , available on Game Boy Advance), which is odd because it sounds like she's blowing shit up. The music has nothing to do with the game.

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Wed Aug 04, 2004 10:42 am i recall that it was vaguely similair to the eva theme or something... but it looked like an action game..
